title: Disability Tax Credit Statistics - Canada.ca
content:
## Disability Tax Credit statistics
The Disability Tax Credit (DTC) statistics present data based on the information that the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) collected and processed for all eligible individual recipients for a specific calendar year.
For further information on the DTC please refer to the benefits section.
- DTC statistics (2015 to 2024 by calendar year)
- DTC statistics (2014 to 2023 by calendar year)
- DTC statistics (2013 to 2022 by calendar year)
- DTC statistics (2012 to 2021 by calendar year)
- DTC statistics (2011 to 2020 by calendar year)
- DTC statistics (2011 to 2019 by calendar year)
- DTC statistics (2011 to 2018 by calendar year)
- DTC statistics (2011 to 2017 by fiscal year)

## Select a data visualization dashboard:
- Disability Tax Credit Visualization
